content.text: I'll read all five files for you.

Here is the complete content of all five files:

## 1. SalonForm.tsx
A React component that renders a form for creating/editing salon information. It handles:
- Nome Fantasia (salon name) with URL slug preview
- CNPJ and Razão Social (company legal name) with automatic CNPJ lookup
- Phone and email fields
- Timezone selection
- Optional website/social media link fields

Key features:
- Formats CNPJ and phone numbers automatically
- Fetches company data from CNPJ lookup service when CNPJ is complete
- Displays loading spinner during CNPJ lookup
- Tooltips for user guidance

## 2. SalonForm.types.ts
Defines TypeScript interfaces and constants:
- `SalonFormData` interface with 8 properties (nomeFantasia, razaoSocial, cnpj, telefoneComercial, emailContato, nomeLinkUtil, urlLinkUtil, timezone)
- `SALON_FORM_INITIAL_DATA` constant initializing all fields with empty strings and timezone defaulting to "America/Sao_Paulo"

## 3. CreateSalonPage.tsx
Admin page for creating new salons. Flow:
- Renders SalonForm component
- Validates required fields (nomeFantasia, telefoneComercial, CNPJ if provided)
- Converts form data to CreateSalonDto
- Calls salonService.createWithNetwork()
- Tracks event via severinoService
- Shows loading state and success/error toasts
- Navigates back to /admin/salons on success

## 4. EditSalonPage.tsx
Admin page for editing existing salons. Features:
- Loads salon data on component mount using salon ID from URL params
- Populates form with existing salon data
- Validates same fields as CreateSalonPage
- Converts form data to UpdateSalonDto
- Includes active/inactive toggle switch
- Calls salonService.update()
- Shows loading spinner while fetching data
- Shows success/error toasts

## 5. SalonsPage.tsx
Admin dashboard listing all salons with:
- DataTable component showing salon list
- Search functionality (debounced 500ms) by name, phone, or address
- Status filter (All/Active/Inactive)
- Pagination with configurable page size
- Three action buttons per row: View, Edit, Toggle Status
- Mobile-responsive with card view on smaller screens
- Actions to view salon, edit details, or activate/deactivate

All files use Tailwind CSS, React Context for auth, custom hooks (useDebouncedValue, useSelectedSalon), and shadcn/ui components.
